turns.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(final_amount) AS total_sales FROM orders;

SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name AS customer_name, SUM(o.final_amount) AS total_sales FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.customer_name ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 5;
